run_card.description: Optional run-card pointer (YAML/JSON/MD). If provided, hep-calc copies it into out_dir/inputs/ as run_card.<ext> and records it in manifest.json.

scaling.description: Multiplier applied to extracted LaTeX value before comparison (e.g. 1000 for GeV->MeV).

enable_fa_fc.description: Enable the (scaffold) FeynArts→FormCalc pipeline; requires custom scripts/spec for real processes.

entry.description: Path to a Mathematica .wls/.m file to execute when FA/FC pipeline is enabled.

auto_qft.description: Automated FeynRules → FeynArts → FormCalc pipeline for generating diagrams and (unrenormalized) amplitudes.

enable.description: Explicit enable/disable switch. If true, always run auto_qft. If false, always skip. If omitted, hep-calc may implicitly enable auto_qft when both process + model are specified.

feynarts_model.description: FeynArts-only mode: use a built-in (or already-available) FeynArts model name, and skip the FeynRules export step. Example: QED. When set, process.in_fa/out_fa are required.

feynarts_generic_model.description: FeynArts-only mode: optional GenericModel name (default: same as feynarts_model). Example: QED.

feynrules_root.description: Path to FeynRules installation directory (must contain FeynRules.m and FeynRulesPackage.m). If null/omitted, uses FEYNRULES_PATH env var or ~/Library/Wolfram/Applications/FeynRules.

model_files.description: FeynRules mode: one or more FeynRules .fr files to LoadModel[...]. Ignored when feynarts_model is set.

lagrangian_symbol.description: FeynRules mode: name of the Lagrangian symbol to export (e.g. LSM). Must be a simple symbol name. Ignored when feynarts_model is set.

model_build.description: Optional: build/augment a FeynRules model from LaTeX-extracted blocks (agent supplies rewrite rules).

enable.description: Enable/disable model_build explicitly. If omitted, providing tex_paths or inline_tex implicitly enables this stage.

tex_paths.description: LaTeX source files to extract math blocks from. Paths are resolved relative to the job file.

inline_tex.description: Inline LaTeX snippet (as a single virtual block). Mutually exclusive with tex_paths.

flatten.description: If true, run latexpand to flatten multi-file TeX inputs.

expand_usepackage.description: Pass --expand-usepackage to latexpand (may be slower/more fragile).

macro_overrides.description: Macro overrides applied after preamble extraction (best-effort). Keys may be with or without leading backslash.

mode.description: Block selection strategy. lagrangian_like uses include/exclude regex on normalized TeX; all_math_blocks selects everything extracted.

include_patterns.description: Regex patterns (Python re) used for selecting blocks when mode=lagrangian_like. Default matches \\mathcal{L} and \\mathscr{L}.

exclude_patterns.description: Regex patterns to exclude after include filtering.

parse_policy.description: How to handle Mathematica TeXForm parse failures: best_effort records failures and continues; strict fails model_build if any selected row fails.

base_model_files.description: Optional FeynRules .fr skeleton files to load before the generated Lagrangian (fields/parameters declarations, background sources, etc.).

rewrite_wls.description: Path to a Mathematica .wls/.m file defining HepCalcModelBuildRewrite[parsedBlocks_, ctx_]. This is agent-provided code and executes with full Mathematica privileges.

process.description: Process definition. In FeynRules mode, prefer process.in/out with ParticleName strings (e.g. e-, e+). Use in_fa/out_fa for explicit FeynArts fields (e.g. F[1,{1}], -F[1,{1}]). In FeynArts-only mode (feynarts_model set), in_fa/out_fa are required.

exclude_topologies.description: FeynArts ExcludeTopologies list (string tokens; currently recognized: Tadpoles).

counterterms.description: Whether to include counterterm vertices (default false for unrenormalized amplitudes).

enable.description: If true, attempt FormCalc reduction (may require external FORM/ReadForm binaries). If false, keep raw FeynArts amplitude expressions.

memory_limit_mb.description: Hard memory cap for the fresh-kernel FormCalc reducer.

tag.description: When integrations includes research-team, required to sync core artifacts to artifacts/runs/<TAG>/

research_team_root.description: Optional explicit root directory for research-team integration sync. If null/omitted, auto-detect a parent directory containing artifacts/ or artifacts/runs. If none is found, fail closed instead of falling back to the current working directory. Can also be set via RESEARCH_TEAM_ROOT env var.
